name: agent-odin
description: Deployable service foundation for the GymX programme-planning intelligence service.

scripts.bundle:functions: esbuild api/health.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=supabase/functions/_bundles/health-handler.js && esbuild api/odin/preview.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=supabase/functions/_bundles/preview-handler.js && esbuild api/odin/preview-step.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=supabase/functions/_bundles/preview-step-handler.js
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run bundle:functions && npx supabase functions deploy health preview preview-step
